series_metadata.series_description: Files maintained on employees that contain copies of statewide nominations, awards and recognition by the agency as well as copies of awards generated by outside sources if a copy is provided to the training section. Records may also include those created in the selection process as well as milestone memos and certificates.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Original documents are provided employee. HR will maintain copies two (2) calendar years from date of award. ; Electronic: Original documents are provided employee. HR will maintain copies two (2) calendar years from date of award
